releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X 未完成的自传体流行巨作
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished autobiographical pop masterpiece
releasedThisWeek.summary: Lil Nas X 在《DREAMBOY》中融合流行与嘻哈，以未完成的形式呈现个人成长与艺术探索，充满情感张力。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: In 'DREAMBOY', Lil Nas X blends pop and hip-hop, presenting personal growth and artistic exploration in an unfinished form, full of emotional tension.

releasedThisWeek.title: KL7
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Kendrick Lamar 的深度社会寓言
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《KL7》延续 Kendrick Lamar 对社会议题的犀利剖析，节奏复杂，歌词充满隐喻，是当代嘻哈的里程碑。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'KL7' continues Kendrick Lamar's sharp analysis of social issues, with complex rhythms and metaphorical lyrics, a milestone in contemporary hip-hop.

releasedThisWeek.title: Euphoria
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Euphoria》是 Schiller 标志性的电子氛围专辑，空灵旋律与节奏交织，营造沉浸式听觉体验。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Euphoria' is Schiller's signature electronic ambient album, intertwining ethereal melodies and rhythms for an immersive listening experience.

releasedThisWeek.title: Electric Fantasy
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Pierre Schott 的梦幻合成器流行
releasedThisWeek.summary: 法国音乐人 Pierre Schott 的《Electric Fantasy》融合复古合成器与流行旋律，充满浪漫与未来感。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: French artist Pierre Schott's 'Electric Fantasy' blends retro synths with pop melodies, full of romance and futuristic vibes.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Galaxia Tropical》将拉丁节奏与德国制作结合，热情洋溢，适合舞池与夏日。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Galaxia Tropical' combines Latin rhythms with German production, exuberant and perfect for dance floors and summer.

releasedThisWeek.title: Eingenordet
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Eingenordet》是 Versengold 融合民谣与金属的力作，史诗旋律与强劲节奏交织，充满北欧神话色彩。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Eingenordet' is Versengold's fusion of folk and metal, with epic melodies and powerful rhythms, steeped in Norse mythology.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Don McLean 的现场经典重现
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》收录 Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，演绎经典歌曲，温暖怀旧。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' captures Don McLean's 1975 Manchester concert, performing classic songs with warmth and nostalgia.

releasedThisWeek.title: Melodrama
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Melodrama》是 LINA 的流行专辑，以戏剧化编曲和真挚歌词探索爱情与自我，感染力强。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Melodrama' is LINA's pop album exploring love and self with dramatic arrangements and heartfelt lyrics, highly infectious.

releasedThisWeek.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Robin Trower 的布鲁斯摇滚现场
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《One Moment in Time: Live in the USA》收录 Robin Trower 美国现场，吉他技艺精湛，布鲁斯韵味浓厚。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'One Moment in Time: Live in the USA' captures Robin Trower's US concert, showcasing masterful guitar work and deep blues flavor.

releasedThisWeek.title: The Power Station
releasedThisWeek.highlight: The Power Station 的超级乐队回归
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《The Power Station》同名专辑由 Robert Palmer 等成员打造，融合摇滚与放克，经典再现。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album, featuring Robert Palmer and others, blends rock and funk, a classic revival.

releasedThisWeek.title: Plays World Hits
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Michiel van der Kuy 的合成器世界名曲
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Michiel van der Kuy's synth world hits
releasedThisWeek.summary: 《Plays World Hits》是 Michiel van der Kuy 用合成器重新演绎世界名曲，复古电子风味独特。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: 'Plays World Hits' features Michiel van der Kuy reinterpreting world hits with synthesizers, offering a unique retro electronic flavor.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: 流行巨星Lil Nas X未完成专辑，充满实验性与情感张力
upcoming.highlightEn: Pop superstar Lil Nas X's unfinished album, brimming with experimentation and emotional intensity
upcoming.summary: Lil Nas X的未完成专辑，融合流行、嘻哈与实验元素，展现其大胆艺术探索。
upcoming.summaryEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished album blends pop, hip-hop, and experimental elements, showcasing his bold artistic exploration.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: 经典摇滚乐队同名专辑，80年代超级组合重现
upcoming.highlightEn: Classic rock band's self-titled album, a supergroup from the 80s returns
upcoming.summary: The Power Station同名专辑，由Chic成员与Robert Palmer等组成，融合放克与硬摇滚。
upcoming.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album, featuring members of Chic and Robert Palmer, blends funk with hard rock.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: 德国电子音乐大师Schiller新作，营造迷幻氛围
upcoming.highlightEn: German electronic maestro Schiller's new work, creating a psychedelic atmosphere
upcoming.summary: Schiller的《Euphoria》延续其标志性的氛围电子风格，适合沉浸式聆听。
upcoming.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature ambient electronic style, perfect for immersive listening.

upcoming.title: IGUATU CITY, Pt. 2
upcoming.highlight: 巴西地下音乐人GUSTAVOEGATOTV的单曲，展现本土节奏
upcoming.highlightEn: Brazilian underground artist GUSTAVOEGATOTV's single, showcasing local rhythms
upcoming.summary: 来自巴西的GUSTAVOEGATOTV带来单曲，融合当地音乐元素与实验制作。
upcoming.summaryEn: GUSTAVOEGATOTV from Brazil delivers a single blending local musical elements with experimental production.

upcoming.title: Utan Ok Innan
upcoming.highlight: Vígundr金属单曲，北欧黑暗氛围
upcoming.highlightEn: Vígundr's metal single, Nordic dark atmosphere
upcoming.summary: Vígundr的《Utan Ok Innan》充满北欧黑暗金属的粗粝与原始力量。
upcoming.summaryEn: Vígundr's 'Utan Ok Innan' is full of the raw and primal power of Nordic black metal.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: 德国民谣金属Versengold新专辑，史诗叙事
upcoming.highlightEn: German folk metal Versengold's new album, epic storytelling
upcoming.summary: Versengold的《Eingenordet》融合民谣旋律与重金属，讲述北方传奇。
upcoming.summaryEn: Versengold's 'Eingenordet' blends folk melodies with heavy metal, telling northern legends.

upcoming.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
upcoming.highlight: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场，经典重现
upcoming.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, classic revisited
upcoming.summary: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场专辑，收录《American Pie》等经典。
upcoming.summaryEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live album features classics like 'American Pie'.

upcoming.title: could never forget
upcoming.highlight: kkaydes全新专辑，氛围电子与低保真融合
upcoming.highlightEn: kkaydes' new album, blending ambient electronic with lo-fi
upcoming.summary: kkaydes的《could never forget》营造梦幻低保真氛围，适合放松聆听。
upcoming.summaryEn: kkaydes' 'could never forget' creates a dreamy lo-fi atmosphere, perfect for relaxation.

upcoming.title: Outroom
upcoming.highlight: X - Tram的实验专辑，挑战听觉边界
upcoming.highlightEn: X - Tram's experimental album, pushing auditory boundaries
upcoming.summary: X - Tram的《Outroom》以前卫噪音实验挑战传统音乐结构。
upcoming.summaryEn: X - Tram's 'Outroom' challenges traditional musical structures with avant-garde noise experiments.

upcoming.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
upcoming.highlight: Robin Trower美国现场，蓝调摇滚大师风采
upcoming.highlightEn: Robin Trower live in the USA, blues-rock mastery
upcoming.summary: Robin Trower美国现场专辑，展现其精湛的蓝调摇滚吉他技艺。
upcoming.summaryEn: Robin Trower's live album in the USA showcases his masterful blues-rock guitar skills.

upcoming.title: Shion. E.P
upcoming.highlight: Rudo的EP《Shion.》，氛围电子与节奏实验
upcoming.highlightEn: Rudo's EP 'Shion.', ambient electronic with rhythmic experimentation
upcoming.summary: Rudo的EP融合氛围电子与独特节奏，适合探索性聆听。
upcoming.summaryEn: Rudo's EP blends ambient electronics with unique rhythms, suitable for exploratory listening.

upcoming.title: Together Again
upcoming.highlight: John McCutcheon与Tom Paxton合作专辑，民谣传奇联手
upcoming.highlightEn: John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton collaboration, folk legends unite
upcoming.summary: 两位民谣传奇John McCutcheon与Tom Paxton的合作专辑，温暖而富有故事性。
upcoming.summaryEn: A collaboration album by two folk legends John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton, warm and storytelling.
